response.justification: Strong senior full-stack profile with ~13 years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Direct hits on the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) plus highly relevant AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators) that matches the team's needs. Demonstrated software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev), cloud/containerization exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and a CS degree. Gaps around the specific Nest.js/Vitest tooling and a heavy investment in the niche D language warrant clarification, but the foundational and adjacent skills strongly suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Direct, recent AI-agent / MCP tooling experience matching a key requirement
Deep multi-language full-stack background with TS/Node/React and strong TDD/CI-CD craftsmanship
Cloud and containerization breadth (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) plus a CS degree
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience named in the primary stack
Significant career focus on niche DLang rather than Kotlin/Java backend services
React depth appears limited to one role; no PostgreSQL named (MongoDB/MySQL only)
